title: Commercial Officer
description:
Specific Duties and Responsibilities 

  • Manage all commercial matters, including follow-up on existing Charter Parties, preparation of tenders, and negotiation with clients within the assigned segment:
  • Monitor competitors, market conditions, and industry trends to support strategic decision-making; 
  • Identify, develop, and present business cases for new commercial opportunities;
  • Identify, assess, and quantify commercial and contractual risks associated with tenders and contracts;
  • Respond proactively to all relevant business opportunities within the assigned segment;
  • Take an active role in identifying, developing, and introducing additional services to expand the Company’s service portfolio.
  • Hold P&L responsibility for day-to-day business activities, including preparation of commercial decision support for tenders, lay-up, idle, and reactivation scenarios;
  • Provide timely commercial input and recommendations for tenders and business opportunities.
  • Keep the Commercial Manager informed of major commercial matters that may impact P&L performance. 

Required Competence

  • Minimum 1-3 years of relevant experience from commercial, brokering or contractual work; fresh graduates from maritime-related institutions/university may be considered.
  • Strong background in business development and marketing.
  • Goal-oriented, commercially minded, and results-driven.
  • Demonstrated strong negotiation skills with a proven track record.
  • Ability to establish, develop, and maintain long-term business relationships.
  • Solid understanding of Charter Parties, including legal, commercial, and operational aspects.
  • Experience with subcontracts and management of subcontractors.
  • Proficient in preparing commercial calculations and identifying and quantifying risk elements.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
  • Proficient in standard office ICT tools.
  • Strong collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively as part of a team and demonstrate leadership capability.

postedCompany.description:
Solstad Offshore is a leading provider of specialized offshore tonnage to global energy markets (Oil & Gas and Renewables) with approx. 40 high spec and modern vessels and more than 2000 highly skilled employees worldwide. Our vessels and expertise provide our partners in the offshore energy industry with a safe, reliable and professional solution. Our activities are mainly concentrated in the markets in Europe, Brazil, Australia and Asia.

Our Singapore office, Solstad Management Singapore Pte Ltd, is now seeking for a highly motivated and committed individual for the position of Commercial Officer, to the Commercial Manager.
postedCompany.name: SOLSTAD MANAGEMENT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
